job_listing.company_values: Continuous growth, clarity in communication, and measurable progress.
job_listing.job_description: Design and deliver soft-skills and technical training for client organizations. Must be proficient in Articulate Rise and LMS management.

candidate_resume.summary: Former High School Teacher with 10 years experience in classroom instruction and lesson planning.

experience.responsibilities: Developed district-wide social studies curriculum. Integrated digital learning tools for 150 students.

suggested_interviewer_questions: Corporate training moves much faster than a school year. How will you adapt your instructional design for busy adults with short attention spans?
We use Articulate Rise for e-learning. Since you used Google Classroom, how comfortable are you building interactive SCORM-compliant modules?

sample_candidate_responses.response: Adults need to know the 'immediate application' of what they are learning. I focus on micro-learning—breaking complex topics into 5-minute modules that provide actionable takeaways they can use the same day.

The logic of sequencing content is the same as lesson planning. I have been practicing with a trial version of Articulate and find the block-based design very similar to the web-based tools I used for distance learning.

must_flag: If the interviewer misses the transition gap from K-12 education to Corporate L&D.

guardrail_checks.topic_lock: Professional interview and resume prep only.
